name: mdshare
description: Free markdown sharing via MCP. Upload markdown files to mdshare.live and get shareable URLs with four permission tiers (admin/edit/comment/view), inline-anchored comments, real-time sync, and 90-day expiry — no login required. The MCP server uses file_path so large markdown files don't burn conversation tokens.

interface.longDescription: Upload markdown files to mdshare.live and get shareable URLs in one tool call. Four permission tiers (admin / edit / comment / view), inline-anchored comments, real-time sync, 90-day expiry. No login, no accounts. The MCP server uses file_path so large markdown files don't burn conversation tokens.
defaultPrompt: share this markdown with my team as a comment-only link
